description: Collect local documentation-discovery telemetry without affecting Codex commands.

hooks.command: if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/tt-codex-hook.py" --client codex; else exec python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/tt-codex-hook.py" --client codex; fi

if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/tt-codex-hook.py" --client codex; else exec python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/tt-codex-hook.py" --client codex; fi

if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/tt-codex-hook.py" --client codex; else exec python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/tt-codex-hook.py" --client codex; fi

if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/tt-codex-hook.py" --client codex; else exec python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/tt-codex-hook.py" --client codex; fi
